problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Combining Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
